pi_items.source: Verified via grep in setup_mysql_workbench.sh downloading sakila-db.zip from dev.mysql.com and setup_task.sh explicitly querying the 'sakila' schema.
Verified via setup_task.sh introducing gaps specifically for July 2005 dates and task description explicitly asking for July 2005 calendar.
Verified via setup_task.sh executing DELETE FROM payment WHERE DATE(payment_date) in ('2005-07-04', '2005-07-15').
Verified via the verifier.py logic explicitly checking if 'main_csv_rows == 31', matching the 31 days in July 2005.
Verified via export_result.sh looking for the file at this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official MySQL Sakila sample database. The setup script explicitly deletes payment records for July 4th and July 15th, 2005, introducing the temporal gaps that the user must fill. The objective is to produce a continuous 31-day daily revenue report for July 2005 to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/july_revenue_continuous.csv' and an explicit zero-revenue day list to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/zero_revenue_days.csv'. All metadata claims align perfectly with the setup, verifier, and export script configurations.
